def positive_same_precondition_checked_in_multiple_sibling_branches():
    rule_id = "same_precondition_checked_in_multiple_sibling_branches"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag functions that repeat the same guard in several branches instead of normalizing once."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
